customAttributes.description:
As B.O.B. (Bevy of Beebles) enters the battlefield, create four 1/1 blue Beeble creature tokens.
The number of loyalty counters on B.O.B. is equal to the number of Beebles you control. (Create or sacrifice Beebles whenever B.O.B. gains or loses loyalty.)
[+1]: Up to X target Beebles can’t be blocked this turn, where X is the number of cards in your hand.
[-1]: Draw a card.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 2/29/2020. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
